title: cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. heterosepala
intro: Cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. heterosepala, also known as the hairy woodlander or heterosepala, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. heterosepala include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and astringent. It is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
